isi.lyrics:
Lyric Yumewanaii & SUSKI - Spit like this

Romanization

Yeah, we spit like this
Kungfu stance when I swing my wrist
Yeah, we spit like this
Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
singgyeong an sseo nae stanceneun jom deo wi
Yeah, we spit like this
Chop that beat, leave no witness

Yeah, we spit like this
Kungfu stance when I swing my wrist
Yeah, we spit like this
Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
singgyeong an sseo nae stanceneun jom deo wi
Yeah, we spit like this
Chop that beat, leave no witness

Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?

OK Never be cute just to get that check, earn respect
Never be quiet, Never be less so they feel mo ollyeo chegeup
NO thanks Never be yours an dwae nigeo
baeteo nonggeon chaegim, chaenggyeo baero beoreo baero georeo
sseoreo meogeo

Never been fake, never been tame
Never been one just to play game
Never been safe, never stayed clean
nae kkoeneun maja ssinui geime

nunchi ssaum nuga sullae
jineun nomeun meokgo jungne
salmeun machi naneun sulgeim
jeongsin nagal geot gata ije

yeah nan baeteoya dwae kung fu bokseo anim baeryeo sok
haejang andwae spit like noryeok jom deo stance ollyeo deo
never be, never been ppeonhan geon anhago geolchyeosseo
nae geoni jyae geoni jaengtaljeoneun narangeun jibeochyeo

one two three net da yeoseot baeteo deo
chapi mungchyeo danineun nomdeul eoseo ppaeseo heuteojyeo
momjip hana kiwo makhimyeon jal kiwoseo ppureoteuryeo
geori wi nomdeul manado na hana mot jappateuryeo

Yeah, we spit like this
Kungfu stance when I swing my wrist
Yeah, we spit like this
Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
singgyeong an sseo nae stanceneun jom deo wi
Yeah, we spit like this
Chop that beat, leave no witness

Yeah, we spit like this
Kungfu stance when I swing my wrist
Yeah, we spit like this
Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
गर्न सक्दैन नि diss
Yeah, we spit like this
Chop that beat, leave no witness

Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?

Big didi in the house
Extra spicy got that hot saucy
Working overtime
Cus its our time to shine
NPL to KR,
putting Asia on the map
annyeonghaseyo to my cutie yume- ni Baini

S u s k I
Keeping it real
till the day I die
DIY
Did it on my own,
aint no lie
Do or die,
If being sick is a crime
Lock me up,
cus I beat the beat up
and make it mine
A to Zed of rap,
Its about time your girl snapped

Big didi ayo sabei lei sikauna
kitaab kholera baas
kachuwa ko race ma kei chaina rush
Your fake pretense goes bust
All these nautangisss turn to dust
superficial crust with no guts
kei reply chaina bhaye
chuplagera bhana hus

MVP
I know you D I G
Me
R I P
To all my enemies,
hating cause you aint got the D O Double G
Like me no

Time is a valuable thing, never wasting rhymes
Your flow is a dime a dozen
Sabei lei boki rako cha
tara kei baneko chaina

Hangeul

Yeah, we spit like this
Kungfu stance when I swing my wrist
Yeah, we spit like this
Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
신경 안 써 내 stance는 좀 더 위
Yeah, we spit like this
Chop that beat, leave no witness

Yeah, we spit like this

Low kick flow with a high-top twist
Yeah, we spit like this
신경 안 써 내 stance는 좀 더 위

Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?
Yeah, we spit like this, spit like this, spit like this, WHAT?

Never be quiet, Never be less so they feel mo 올려 체급
NO thanks Never be yours 안 돼 니거
뱉어 논건 책임, 챙겨 배로 벌어 배로 걸어
썰어 먹어

Never been fake, never been tame
Never been one just to play game
Never been safe, never stayed clean
내 꾀는 맞아 씬의 게임에

눈치 싸움 누가 술래
지는 놈은 먹고 죽네
삶은 마치 나는 술게임
정신 나갈 것 같아 이제

yeah 난 뱉어야 돼 kung fu 복서 아님 배려 속
해장 안돼 spit like 노력 좀 더 stance 올려 더
never be, never been 뻔한 건 안하고 걸쳤어
내 거니 쟤 거니 쟁탈전은 나랑은 집어쳐

one two three 넷 다 여섯 뱉어 더
차피 뭉쳐 다니는 놈들 어서 뺏어 흩어져
몸집 하나 키워 막히면 잘 키워서 뿌러트려
거리 위 놈들 많아도 나 하나 못 자빠트려

isi.fileNames: 평범한 사랑 이야기 (ordinary love story) (feat. Monk)
isi.driveFileNames: Private Story - 평범한 사랑 이야기 (ordinary love story) (feat. Monk).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Private Story - 평범한 사랑 이야기 (ordinary love story) (feat. Monk)

Romanization

eotteoge halkka heeojijaneun mare
mujakjeong geobi nasseosseo
pyeongsowa gateun tujeong seokkin seupgwanui mari
oneuri mwongga dareun geol

jayeonseureoun mannamgwa ibyeolhaneun
sumaneun gwajeongppuninde
yunanhi apa naman neomu saranghan tase
pyeonanhi nwajujil mothae

gyeolgugeun kkeutnaseo hollo namgyeojyeo itgo
buranhagiman han nae maeum butjaba
joatdeon geuttae saenggagi namyeon
dasi neoreul chatgetji geureon ppeonhan naran geol anikka

teullin ge eomneun uri heeojin iyu
ne mari museun tteusinji
ijen algesseo geudongan neon eottaesseonneunji
alji mothae yeogikkajin geoya

gyeolgugeun kkeutnaseo hollo namgyeojyeo itgo
buranhagiman han nae maeum butjaba
joatdeon geuttae saenggagi namyeon
dasi neoreul chatgetji geureon ppeonhan naran geol anikka

iksukhaejyeosseonna bwa geojimmalcheoreom
geuge uril gallanoeun geoya
naegen jigeumeul badadeurineun ge
eoullyeo modeun ge muneojyeodo

gyeolgugen kkeutnasseo
amureoji anke jal jinaegil baralge
majimak insarago naege haetdeon mal
deo isang hal su inneun ge eopseo
ireoge neowa naneun
pyeongbeomhan sarang iyagi jung hanayeonna bwa

Hangeul

어떻게 할까 헤어지자는 말에
무작정 겁이 났었어
평소와 같은 투정 섞인 습관의 말이
오늘이 뭔가 다른 걸

자연스러운 만남과 이별하는
수많은 과정뿐인데
유난히 아파 나만 너무 사랑한 탓에
편안히 놔주질 못해

결국은 끝나서 홀로 남겨져 있고
불안하기만 한 내 마음 붙잡아
좋았던 그때 생각이 나면
다시 너를 찾겠지 그런 뻔한 나란 걸 아니까

틀린 게 없는 우리 헤어진 이유
네 말이 무슨 뜻인지
이젠 알겠어 그동안 넌 어땠었는지
알지 못해 여기까진 거야

결국은 끝나서 홀로 남겨져 있고
불안하기만 한 내 마음 붙잡아
좋았던 그때 생각이 나면
다시 너를 찾겠지 그런 뻔한 나란 걸 아니까

익숙해졌었나 봐 거짓말처럼
그게 우릴 갈라놓은 거야
내겐 지금을 받아들이는 게
어울려 모든 게 무너져도

결국엔 끝났어
아무렇지 않게 잘 지내길 바랄게
마지막 인사라고 내게 했던 말
더 이상 할 수 있는 게 없어
이렇게 너와 나는
평범한 사랑 이야기 중 하나였나 봐

isi.lyrics:
Lyric MongDoll - YES MAN

Romanization

maeil achim nuneul tteumyeon ssayeo inneun butakdeul
“nega haejul su inni?” hwaginhagon ilsi jeongji
(nep!) neukkimpyo, unneun imotikon, ipsureul kkwak muneun na
hal mareun manchi, hajiman chamaya hae

haruharu neureoganeun pirowa gipeun hansum
nae mameun dwiro sumgyeo nwa, gogaeman joyonghi kkeudeogyeo

Yes, Yes, Yes, modureul wihan oechim
Yes, Yes, Yes, nae maeumeul musihan oechim
aesseo sikhyeo watdeon maeumdeul, jaega doeeo ssayeo man ga
Yes, Yes, Yes, eonjen gan hechyeo gaya hal sukje
machimnae naegedo deullyeo
maeum gipsukhan moksori, ijeneun oechil geoya
No No No No

naega bepun houideureun dangyeonhan geosi dwaetji
‘jom deo himdeulgo malji’ saenggakhaetdeon baboyeotji
(heok!) seuteureseu, tteok jin meori, nureobuteun keopi jan
joeun ge joji, hajiman eonjekkaji?

naega piryohal ttaen du nun banjjagimyeo watdaga
mokjeogeul dalseonghan dwiron chagapge tteonadeon dwimmoseup

Yes, Yes, Yes, modureul wihan oechim
Yes, Yes, Yes, nae maeumeul musihan oechim
aesseo sikhyeo watdeon maeumdeul, jaega doeeo ssayeo man ga

Yes, yes, yes, eonjen gan hechyeo gaya hal sukje
machimnae naegedo deullyeo
maeum gipsukhan moksori, ijeneun oechil geoya
No No No No

Hangeul

매일 아침 눈을 뜨면 쌓여 있는 부탁들
“네가 해줄 수 있니?” 확인하곤 일시 정지
(넵!) 느낌표, 웃는 이모티콘, 입술을 꽉 무는 나
할 말은 많지, 하지만 참아야 해

하루하루 늘어가는 피로와 깊은 한숨
내 맘은 뒤로 숨겨 놔, 고개만 조용히 끄덕여

Yes, Yes, Yes, 모두를 위한 외침
Yes, Yes, Yes, 내 마음을 무시한 외침
애써 식혀 왔던 마음들, 재가 되어 쌓여 만 가
Yes, Yes, Yes, 언젠 간 헤쳐 가야 할 숙제
마침내 내게도 들려
마음 깊숙한 목소리, 이제는 외칠 거야
No No No No

내가 베푼 호의들은 당연한 것이 됐지
‘좀 더 힘들고 말지’ 생각했던 바보였지
(헉!) 스트레스, 떡 진 머리, 눌어붙은 커피 잔
좋은 게 좋지, 하지만 언제까지?

내가 필요할 땐 두 눈 반짝이며 왔다가
목적을 달성한 뒤론 차갑게 떠나던 뒷모습

Yes, Yes, Yes, 모두를 위한 외침
Yes, Yes, Yes, 내 마음을 무시한 외침
애써 식혀 왔던 마음들, 재가 되어 쌓여 만 가

Yes, yes, yes, 언젠 간 헤쳐 가야 할 숙제
마침내 내게도 들려
마음 깊숙한 목소리, 이제는 외칠 거야
No No No No

(헉!) 스트레스, 떡 진 머리, 눌어붙은 커피 잔
좋은 게 좋지, 하지만 언제까지?

내가 필요할 땐 두 눈 반짝이며 왔다가
목적을 달성한 뒤론 차갑게 떠나던 뒷모습

Yes, Yes, Yes, 모두를 위한 외침
Yes, Yes, Yes, 내 마음을 무시한 외침
애써 식혀 왔던 마음들, 재가 되어 쌓여 만 가

Yes, yes, yes, 언젠 간 헤쳐 가야 할 숙제
마침내 내게도 들려
마음 깊숙한 목소리, 이제는 외칠 거야
No   No   No   No
